approach: ratified re-open of frozen impl-judge.feature — narrow the 'regardless of blast radius' independence scenario to the no-bridge fallback; add a scenario-bridge stage where verification depth is run-level-leash-scoped (Option 2, user-ratified): UNBOUND+FAIL+high-BR-bound judged, low-BR-bound accepted on report
additive impl-producer.feature scenario for the bridge binding convention (self-clears)
deliver = prose edits to sdd-impl-judge.md agent + impl-producer-governance; cold impl-judge static-inspects
cold spec-judge over the re-opened suite; root pnpm verify

why: Wire the default sdd-impl-judge to consume the verify-scenarios bridge for deterministic artifact-types, verification depth scaled by the RUN-LEVEL leash (Option 2, user-ratified re-open in-session). impl-judge.feature RE-OPENED: narrowed the 'regardless of blast radius' scenario to the no-bridge fallback; reworded 'producer green = pre-filter' to scope to the by-hand set; scoped the 4 sibling independence bars (re-derive/diverge-fails/exercise/passing-not-exercising) with an explicit 'the impl-judge judges by hand' Given; added a 7-scenario bridge stage (run bridge; UNBOUND->by-hand; FAIL->failing; low-BR bound->accepted on report; high-BR bound->re-derive+backstop; split reads run-level leash; no-bridge->full by-hand). impl-producer.feature ADDITIVE (self-clears): a deterministic verification is authored under a spec:<node> describe + verbatim scenario-name title so its report binds back. READMEs updated (## Use Cases rows + layered-verdict prose). Cold sdd-spec-judge ALIGNED true after iter 2: iter-1 caught a hard-floor Conflict (4 independence scenarios left unscoped, contradicting the low-BR accept path) -> scoped all 4 to the by-hand set; re-grade confirmed the contradiction gone and the no-bridge universality preserved. check-suite + check-spec-state green. Re-open ratified by user (leash by:user); self-asserted the gate within auto-spec leash, high blast.

Deliver = prose wiring of the bridge into the default judge/producer. sdd-impl-judge.md gained a Map-and-run step 0 (deterministic+bridge -> run verify-scenarios, partition by run-level leash: UNBOUND/high-BR-bound judged by hand, low-BR-bound accepted on report, FAIL failing, no-bridge fallback) + a layered-verdict bridge paragraph; impl-producer-governance gained the spec:<node>+verbatim-title binding convention. Cold sdd-impl-judge IMPLEMENTATION_PASS true after one round (static inspection, agent-behavior artifact): iter-1 blocked on a structural conflict — the pre-existing layered-verdict bullet 1 still asserted 'regardless of blast radius / never the producer's green run as a substitute' unqualified, contradicting the new low-BR carve-out -> scoped bullet 1 to the by-hand set inline + named the carve-out + defined BOUND/UNBOUND vocab; re-verify confirmed all 28 scenario encodings cited, no contradiction, no gaps. Root stays approved (per-unit). Self-asserted within auto-spec leash, high blast.
